name: Charan Karnati
summary: Software engineer with experience building ML-driven supply chain systems, including forecasting models, MIP-based replenishment engines, and real-time inventory optimization. Proficient in Python, C++, Java, and TypeScript with production experience across full-stack development, operations research, and LLM-powered applications.

education.institution: National Institute of Technology (NIT), Andhra Pradesh
education.degree: B.Tech - Computer Science & Engineering, summa cum laude

experience.role: Software Developer Intern - Supply Chain Management
highlights: Built a Probability Sell-Through Model predicting granular level sell-through quantities over a 3-day rolling period; improved forecast accuracy by 18%
Designed time-series forecasting pipelines (LightGBM, XGBoost) for dark store inventory planning; reduced OOS incidents by 10%
Engineered a MIP-based replenishment engine using Google OR-Tools (SCIP solver)
Optimized allocation algorithms improving GMV per cluster by 8%
Owned end-to-end supply chain ML pipeline processing 100K+ daily order signals
Architected full-stack generative AI pipeline (Express, TypeScript, InversifyJS) serving 100+ beta users
Automated course-item creation reducing manual curation time by 65%
Integrated JWT-based auth and role-based access control
Engineered multi-agent simulation with LLM-driven agents in geospatially accurate NYC environment
Built interactive real-time visualization dashboard using Mapbox GL JS

publications.title: Meta-Heuristic Algorithms for the Quasi Total Double Roman Domination Problem
Quantum Key Distribution Protocols: Evolution, Types, and Applications
Quantum Approaches to NP-Hard Combinatorial Optimization Problems
